name: 🔒 Lane: Barrier Participant A
description: HARD-BARRIER DEMONSTRATION (participant A of 2). Both barrier-a and barrier-b must reach the global barrier 'barrier-demo-sync' before EITHER can continue. Watch the ⏳ barrier wait in the log — the slower lane holds the faster one at the barrier point.

checks.prompt: Participant A of the barrier demo: analyse the project's test configuration. List the test runner, coverage tool, and 3 test script commands available. This output will be combined with Participant B's output after the barrier.
checks.pass: ✅ [barrier-a] Test config analysis complete — waiting at barrier
